summary: Completed testing of Pattern Lifecycle filtering and Quick View placeholder removal. Both requirements successfully implemented and working correctly.
passed_tests: Research tab does NOT show 'Quick View - Switch to Structure' placeholder (requirement 1 PASSED)
Pattern Lifecycle section found with all 4 clickable buttons: FORMING, DEVELOPING, CONFIRMED, INVALIDATED
FORMING button click shows 'Filtering: forming' hint and filters patterns correctly
DEVELOPING button click shows 'Filtering: developing' hint
CONFIRMED button click shows 'Filtering: confirmed' hint and filters patterns
Repeated click on same button removes filter and shows 'Click to filter' hint
Pattern Lifecycle filtering integrated with TA Explorer showing filtered results
Tech Analysis page loads correctly with Research and Structure tabs functional
Pattern detection working properly (Double Bottom, Loose Wedge, Loose Range patterns detected)
All lifecycle stage buttons are clickable and provide proper visual feedback
